{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323020637845F623348D4752A3A31\"}"},"total":58},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617302691240772376","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"小说的文字如诗如画，每一句话都经过精心雕琢，既简洁明了又富含深意，读起来如同享受一场文字的盛宴，让人沉醉其中，不愿释卷。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773543954,"group_id":"7589851603834768408","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6H77DnuaZ+0btzuboLdRd8OM7veclQb6YPdoSiEmqLC","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/caaec848251a40739287d38eb320e8fb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776796836\u0026x-signature=jG8UzvV5XPKQgRIL3DnlcFLwKZQ%3D","user_id":"2796782086526535","user_name":"小阿欣欣啊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2796782086526535","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7589851603834768408","book_info":{"abstract":"（年代+复仇+乡村神医+多女+权谋+经商）九十年代小张庄村，将张小虎兄妹拉扯大的单身老爹，刚娶后妈王美凤过门，就将她和村长弟弟堵在家中，对方没有愧色，反而和村长哥哥带人在他家门口，让张小虎彻底失去了父亲，而血气方刚的他，也被打成了傻子，刚翻身的一家人，跌入了深渊，都以为张小虎一辈子无翻身之日时，老宅的一个夜晚，外获得了传承了医术，本着解救妇女，治病除恶的原则，从村长老婆开始，一场猫戏老鼠的大戏开幕了.......","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1d2d2edc8bdd1f38ad3df5a08d4d6c20","author":"爆火子薇","author_id":"","book_id":"7589851603834768408","book_name":"乡村痞医复仇，解救村长老婆开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":124,\"name\":\"都市修真\",\"schema\":\"dr n":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"评个五星，开头有点慢热，后面的剧情开始慢慢越来顺，越来越刺激，我比较喜欢村长老婆和他兄弟老婆这一对姐妹花，希望能给她们一个好的结局。","text_exts":[{"e":52,"s":49,"text":"姐妹花","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E5%A7%90%E5%A6%B9%E8%8A%B1\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774202797752A3A31%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227615463396164338456%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227589851603834768408%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A7%90%E5%A6%B9%E8%8A%B1%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773117897,"group_id":"7589851603834768408","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nyu6GJ16thh2vYhP4AWwsumUZGU0ZHG8eqs19M7YQ5Hg","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1118629506331546","user_name":"藏龙涧的堕花雨"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1118629506331546","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7589851603834768408","book_info":{"abstract":"（年代+复仇+乡村神医+多女+权谋+经商）九十年代小张庄村，将张小虎兄妹拉扯大的单身老爹，刚娶后妈王美凤过门，就将她和村长弟弟堵在家中，对方没有愧色，反而和村长哥哥带人在他家门口，让张小虎彻底失去了父亲，而血气方刚的他，也被打成了傻子，刚翻身的一家人，跌入了深渊，都以为张小虎一辈子无翻身之日时，老宅的一个夜晚，外获得了传承了医术，本着解救妇女，治病除恶的原则，从村长老婆开始，一场猫戏老鼠的大戏开幕了.......","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1d2d2edc8bdd1f38ad3df5a08d4d6c20","author":"爆火子薇","author_id":"","book_id":"7589851603834768408","book_name":"乡村痞医复仇，解救村长老婆开始","book_short_name":"","book_type
